_comment: Archived (shipped) roadmaps. Companion to active-roadmaps.json. A plan lands here when all its tickets are Done AND a closing comment was attached at ship time. New entries are appended at the top (reverse-chronological by shipped_at). Schema: slug, name, ticket_ids OR ticket_id_range, decision_date, note, shipped_at, closing_comment, ticket_snapshot, cycle_time_days, workstream. Backfilled 2026-05-25 from git history of merges to main; extended 2026-06-04 with six arcs shipped 2026-05-26..2026-06-03 (T-076..T-103).

archived_roadmaps.name: Nav consolidation + Apollo import + Daily Agenda polish
archived_roadmaps.note: Three dashboard polish arcs: Apollo batch prospect-import endpoint (T-100), nav consolidation into a Reports section + Pipeline retirement (T-101), and Daily Agenda layout rework — Morning Brief above the Lifecycle table with collapsible/compact charts (T-103).
archived_roadmaps.closing_comment: Backfilled 2026-06-04 from git history of merges to main. T-100 (POST /api/crm/import-prospects for Apollo batch import) merged PR #91. T-101 (consolidate nav — Reports section + retire Pipeline) merged PR #93. T-103 (Daily Agenda — Morning Brief above Lifecycle; collapse + compact charts) merged PR #97. Railway auto-deployed on each merge.

Consolidate nav — Reports section + retire Pipeline

archived_roadmaps.name: Cool-navy dashboard theme pass
archived_roadmaps.note: Dashboard dark-theme rework to a true Prism navy with proper depth and chart legibility. T-097 initial lighten, T-098 depth + chart legibility, T-099 lighten blue-family chart fills for contrast.
archived_roadmaps.closing_comment: Backfilled 2026-06-04 from git history. T-097 (lighten dark theme to true Prism navy) PR #87, T-098 (cool-navy theme — depth + chart legibility) PR #88, T-099 (lighten blue-family chart fills) PR #89. All merged same day.

archived_roadmaps.name: Post-merge close-out GitHub Action (auto WIP-lock clear)
archived_roadmaps.note: GitHub Action that auto-clears the stale WIP=1 lock after a PR merges (T-094), plus a follow-up keeping the close-out Action green under the org PR-policy + branch-name polish (T-095).
archived_roadmaps.closing_comment: Backfilled 2026-06-04 from git history. T-094 (post-merge close-out Action — auto-clear stale WIP=1 lock) PR #81, T-095 (close-out stays green under org PR-policy + branch-name polish) PR #83. Same day.

archived_roadmaps.name: Mission Control Lifecycle Spectrum (5-state view) + lifecycle actions
archived_roadmaps.note: The 5-state Lifecycle Spectrum view itself (T-078), a perf fix deduping the duplicate Notion fetch (T-080), and the on-page lifecycle actions: Inbox→Ticket promote (T-082), Pending→Active promote + Dismiss (T-084), Handoff→Plan spawn (T-083), and the Refresh button bypassing the 60s cache (T-086). This is the very surface the Active/Shipped states render on.
archived_roadmaps.closing_comment: Backfilled 2026-06-04 from git history. T-078 (Lifecycle Spectrum 5-state view) PR #63, T-080 (dedupe duplicate Notion fetch, 3.3s→~1.6s) PR #65, T-082 (Inbox→Ticket promote) PR #67, T-083 (Handoff→Plan spawn) PR #69, T-084 (Pending→Active promote + Dismiss) PR #68, T-086 (Refresh button bypassing 60s cache) PR #70.

archived_roadmaps.name: Tickets page v2 — Phases A–F
archived_roadmaps.note: Single-ticket arc with 6 internal phases (A–F) plus Michele's polish + side fixes. ~1,922 lines added in one PR. End-to-end smoke verified in local preview throughout session.
archived_roadmaps.closing_comment: Merged via PR #55 as 530dd64 (squash). Phases A–F shipped together with two openTicketByKey fix tiers (title-prefix + NTN-uuid → notion_page_id fallback) and housekeeping. ~1,922 lines added. Railway auto-deployed to prod on merge.

ticket_snapshot.title: Tickets page v2 — Phases A–F + Michele's polish + side fixes

archived_roadmaps.name: Notion-as-source migration (Phases 1–4 + 5b)
archived_roadmaps.note: Multi-phase migration of the dashboard ticket store from SQLite to Notion. Phases 1–4 (T-023, T-024, T-025, T-026) plus the empty-mappable-update adapter fix (T-026a) and the Notion comments adapter (T-027b — Phase 5b prerequisite) shipped under this arc. The remaining T-027a/c/d/e sub-tickets (drop SQLite tables + action_items decommission + final cleanup) continue as separate future work tracked in TASKS.md Up Next.
archived_roadmaps.closing_comment: 5 phases + adapter fix shipped over 21 days. Phase 1 (T-023, read-path adapter behind USE_NOTION_SOURCE) merged 2026-05-03 PR #13. Phase 2 (T-024, duplicate audit) merged 2026-05-08 PR #14. Phase 3 (T-025, DB cleanup + reconciliation) merged 2026-05-16 PR #17. Phase 4 (T-026, write-path cutover) merged 2026-05-18 PR #18. Adapter fix (T-026a, empty-mappable updates as no-ops) merged 2026-05-22 PR #36. Comments adapter (T-027b, Phase 5b prerequisite) merged 2026-05-24 PR #53. Notion is now the canonical write surface for tickets; SQLite tickets table remains as a read-side fallback until T-027a drops it.

ticket_snapshot.title: Notion read-path adapter behind USE_NOTION_SOURCE flag (Phase 1/5)
Duplicate audit script (Phase 2/5)
Notion DB cleanup + Phase 3 reconciliation
Notion-as-source migration Phase 4 — write-path cutover
Notion adapter — empty-mappable updates are no-ops, not 400
Notion-as-source migration Phase 5b — Notion comments adapter

archived_roadmaps.name: Portal domain sweep (T-067)
archived_roadmaps.note: Replace hardcoded `dashboard-api-production-dabe.up.railway.app` with `portal.prismaianalytics.com` across scripts, CI workflow, _redirects, build-site.sh, and active operator docs. Same-day saga: v1 (PR #48) broke prod because the Railway custom domain + Netlify DNS CNAME pre-flight hadn't been done; reverted in PR #49 within ~10 min. V2 (PR #50) shipped after Michele added the Railway custom domain and DNS resolution was verified.
archived_roadmaps.closing_comment: Two-PR arc landed same day. PR #48 (v1) merged as 2eb0c72 but failed because the Railway custom domain + Netlify DNS CNAME for portal.prismaianalytics.com weren't in place — pre-deploy backup workflow #44 curled a non-resolving URL and the website login button went dead. Reverted via PR #49 as bdd981d. Lesson recorded: always nslookup the target domain via 8.8.8.8/1.1.1.1 before merging infra-dependent sweeps. Re-merged as PR #50 (f027406) after DNS + SSL were verified live (Server: railway-edge confirmed via --resolve bypass at 21:37 UTC).

ticket_snapshot.title: Portal domain sweep (v2) — Railway URL → portal.prismaianalytics.com

archived_roadmaps.name: Mission Control — Daily Agenda + Morning Brief surface
archived_roadmaps.note: 8 sub-phases of T-036 shipped over 2 days. Established the Daily Agenda surface (parent T-036), then iterated through hotfixes (T-036a route boot fix), perf caps (T-036b End of Day → last 10 days), editorial layout (T-036c parser + Top 10 extraction), brief rendering (T-036e), Railway deployment fixes (T-036f stage briefs, T-036h Dockerfile COPY reports/), and the per-day collapsible cards (T-036g). T-036d (orchestrator structured output contract) is intentionally NOT in this arc — it stays in TASKS.md Up Next.
archived_roadmaps.closing_comment: 8 PRs over 2 days replaced the prior Daily Review surface with a Mission Control Daily Agenda anchored on the morning-brief Top 10. Parent T-036 merged 2026-05-21 PR #24. Same-day hotfix T-036a merged PR #25 (boot routing). Perf cap T-036b merged PR #28. Editorial layout T-036c merged PR #31. Brief rendering T-036e merged PR #32. Deploy fixes T-036f (stage 22 historical briefs into Railway) merged PR #33, T-036h (Dockerfile COPY reports/) merged PR #35. Per-day collapsible T-036g merged PR #34. Validated post-deploy: morning brief renders Top 10 above the fold, sections collapse to needed-Michele / carry-forward / maturity / what-landed / data-hygiene.

ticket_snapshot.title: Daily Agenda + Mission Control today panel + nav reorganization
Hotfix — route post-login bootstrap to loaders['daily-agenda']
Cap End of Day to last 10 days (Daily Agenda perf fix)
End of Day editorial layout + mini-markdown parser + Top 10 extraction
Surface morning brief on Daily Agenda — Top 10 + sections
Deploy morning briefs to Railway (gitignore carve-out + stage 22 historical briefs)
Per-day collapsible End of Day cards + attach morning brief to each day's Top 10
Include reports/ in production Docker image (fix broken brief surface)
